content:
# Session 7 (iter-007) — review

## Metadata
- 2 parallel prover lanes (both `mathlib-build`, independent files): **Basic.lean** (relativeProj
  single-chart model) + **Functors.lean** (Grassmannian GlueData `f_id`/`t_id` + `t'` gate core).
- Sorry count: **Basic 6→6, Functors 16→16** (NO sorry closed, NO new sorry, NO axiom).
  Both lanes ADD axiom-clean *infrastructure* helpers, not sorry-closures of existing decls.
- Declarations added: **21 total** (13 Basic + 8 Functors), all `#print axioms ⊆ {propext,
  Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`, all build green.
- dag: `gaps=0`, `frontier=0`, `unmatched=20` (the 20 named new helpers; 1 anon instance untracked).
- `sync_leanok` iter=7, added 0 / removed 0 (consistent — all 20 are `lean_aux`, no blueprint blocks).

## Lane 1 — Basic.lean (relativeProj single-chart model) — PARTIAL (sub-objective COMPLETE)
Built the complete single affine chart of the relative-`Proj`/projective-bundle keystone, axiom-clean,
and retargeted the structure morphism onto the honest base `Spec A`. 13 decls (`section ProjChart`):
- `projChartGrading` (= `homogeneousSubmodule (Fin (n+1)) A`), `projChart` (= `Proj` of it),
  `projChartToSpecZero` (= `Proj.toSpecZero`).
- `projChart_finiteType`, `projChartToSpecZero_isSeparated`, `projChartToSpecZero_isProper`.
- `algebraMap_projChartGradeZero_bijective`, `projChartGradeZeroEquiv` (`A ≃+* 𝒜0`),
  `specGradeZeroIsoSpecBase` (`Spec 𝒜0 ≅ Spec A`), `projChartToSpecBase`,
  `projChartToSpecBase_isSeparated`, `projChartToSpecBase_isProper`.

Significant attempts (from `attempts_raw.jsonl`):
- **finite-type over 𝒜0**: `infer_instance` for `Algebra.FiniteType (𝒜0) A[t•]` FAILED — Mathlib only
  has finite-type over the *base* `A`. Fix: hand-build `IsScalarTower A (𝒜0) A[t•]`
  (`IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq` + `SetLike.GradeZero.{algebraMap_apply,coe_algebraMap}`), then
  `Algebra.FiniteType.of_restrictScalars_finiteType A _ _` transfers finiteness down the tower. This
  unlocks Mathlib's `Proj` `IsProper` instance.
- **Spec iso from RingEquiv**: first try `Scheme.Spec.mapIso ((CommRingCat.ofHom …).asIso.op)` FAILED —
  `CommRingCat.Hom.asIso` does not exist. Working route: `asIso (Spec.map e.toCommRingCatIso.hom)`
  (`IsIso (Spec.map _)` inferred from the `CommRingCat` iso hom).
- `algebraMap_projChartGradeZero_bijective` (formal "`A[t•]₀ = A`"): injective via `MvPolynomial.C_injective`;
  surjective via `MvPolynomial.homogeneousSubmodule_zero` (`𝒜0 = 1`) + `Submodule.one_eq_range`.

`relativeProj` itself stays `sorry` — prover deliberately did NOT re-sign the protected/anchor stub
(would break downstream). Remaining: `Proj.map`-based frame-change transition isos + trivialising affine
cover of `S`, then `Scheme.GlueData` ⟹ `relativeProj S V := D.glued`. `Proj.map` functoriality
(`AlgebraicGeometry.Proj.map`, `ProjectiveSpectrum/Functor.lean`) confirmed present. See task_results/Basic.lean.md.

## Lane 2 — Functors.lean (Grassmannian GlueData) — PARTIAL
8 axiom-clean decls closing two genuine GlueData fields + the algebraic core of `t'`:
- **`f_id`** = `grassInclusion_self_isIso`: `unfold grassInclusion grassOverlap grassChart grassChartRing`
  FIRST (defs wrap `Spec` but aren't syntactically `Spec`, so `isIso_SpecMap_iff` won't match otherwise),
  then `isIso_SpecMap_iff` + `IsLocalization.atUnit` (since `grassMinor_self`: `P^I_I = 1`).
- **`t_id`** = `grassTransMorphism_self`, via chain `grassMinorMatrixLoc_self` → `grassTransMatrix_self`
  → `grassTransAux_self` (`MvPolynomial.ringHom_ext`) → `grassTrans_self` (`IsLocalization.ringHom_ext`
  + `IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp`) → `grassTransMorphism_self` (`Spec.map_id`; needed trailing `rfl`).
- **`t'` gate core**: `grassTransAux_minor` (`θ_{I,J}(P^J_K) = det((X^I_J)⁻¹)·P^I_K`; ring hom commutes
  with `det`/`submatrix`, `RingHom.map_det` + `Matrix.det_mul`; `rw [grassMinor]` failed — used `change`
  to the explicit submatrix-det goal) and `grassTransAux_minor_isUnit_of` (parametric: image of
  `θ_{I,J}(P^J_K)` is a unit in any algebra inverting `P^I_K`). This is exactly the `awayLift` hypothesis
  the triple-overlap transition needs.

`grassmannianScheme := D.glued` stays the pre-existing typed `sorry` (all-or-nothing: a `sorry` in any
GlueData data/Prop field ships a banned junk scheme). Remaining = `t'` DATA + `t_fac` + `cocycle` via
`pullbackSpecIso` + `IsLocalization.Away.tensor`/`.mul'` + double `Localization.awayLift` (gate in hand),
Prop fields reducing to `IsLocalization.ringHom_ext` + the already-proven `grassmannian_cocycle`. Full
decomposition + dead-end warnings in task_results/Functors.md.

## Discipline / findings
- **Discipline PASSED both lanes**: zero `axiom`; no junk `sorry`-data scheme assembled despite the
  lane targets being the scheme/keystone; honest typed `sorry` + precise in-code handoffs. Same call as
  iter-005/006.
- **Keystone de-risked**: the iter-007 plan's verified anchor bet paid off — `Proj.toSpecZero` +
  `Proj.isSeparated` + finite-type `IsProper` make the chart model and its separated/proper properties
  pure Mathlib glue. This is the affine-local properness fact gating `lem:quot-properness` (though
  `quot_properness` (2) stays blocked until the *stub* `relativeProj` is replaced by the glued build).
- **Iteration mislabel (cosmetic)**: the Functors lane wrote "iter-008" in `task_results/Functors.md`
  and in its memory file; this is iter-007/session_7. No effect on code; flagged so the planner isn't
  confused by the off-by-one in the prover's prose.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No `\mathlibok` candidate (all 21 are genuine proofs assembling Mathlib anchors, not re-exports
  or aliases). No `\lean{...}` rename touched a blueprinted decl (all 20 unmatched helpers were never
  blueprinted). No stale `\notready`. `sync_leanok` (iter=7, +0/−0) is correct — nothing to override.

## Structural (blueprint-doctor) — surfaced for planner
`logs/iter-007/blueprint-doctor.md`: **10 undefined macros in `Functors.tex`** (`\Fin`, `\GrassChart`,
`\GrassVars`, `\grassChartRing`, `\grassFrame`, `\grassFrameLoc`, `\grassMinor`, `\grassOverlapRing`,
`\grassTrans`, `\grassTransMatrix`) crash `leanblueprint web`. Introduced when the iter-007 planner
blueprinted the 22 iter-006 helpers. This is the **4th consecutive iter** of undefined-macro breakage
(`\grass` iter-005; `\NN`/`\relproj`/`\range` iter-006; these now). Recommend a standing `common.tex`
macro block + a doctor-gate before blueprinting new helpers. See recommendations P1.

## Coverage debt
`unmatched=20` — all 20 listed in recommendations.md for the planner to blueprint (13 Basic chart
helpers + 8 Functors GlueData helpers; the prover task_results already supply suggested labels/`\uses`).

## Next session
P1 fix the 10 macros + blueprint the 20 helpers. P2 finish `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` (gate +
all API in hand, low risk). P3 continue relativeProj: `Proj.map` transition isos + trivialising cover.
